channel.title: Asgi on DailyPyTips
channel.description: Recent content in Asgi on DailyPyTips

item.title: FastAPI Day 2: ASGI Changed Everything — Understanding Event Loops & Concurrent Requests
item.description: FastAPI only makes sense once you understand ASGI, event loops, and how async servers actually handle concurrent requests.

item.title: FastAPI Exists Because WSGI Couldn’t Scale Modern APIs
item.description: Before FastAPI, Python web apps lived in a synchronous WSGI world. This post explains why ASGI changed everything.
